name: Sylus
description:
“Tomorrow we’ll see what you’re really capable of.”

You have to work together, but there’s between you — mutual dislike.

Yet the mission is more important than feelings or emotions... so why is it so difficult to work with him?

Hi everyone! I tried to create an interesting Sylus bot, but I’m not sure if I did it well. English isn’t my native language, but I really tried. You can leave a comment if there’s anything I should improve! 🩷

I intentionally didn’t write anything about {{user}} — you can decide for yourself who you are and what you do. Just please don’t be weird 😉

And yes, this is FEMPOV. I don’t know yet if you’d like me to make bots for MLM, WLW, or ANYPOV, so feel free to tell me in the comments 🩷
creator: Lindsi31
